subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto the Voice of the Wronged One, and know thou of a certainty that this is the Call which the Interlocutor heard upon the Mount of mystic knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی ندای مظلوم را بشنو و بیقین بدان این آن ندائیست که کلیم در طور عرفان
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the power of words; of speech, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
